'''''Citadel 1''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Its mission was to [[Rescue at Mon Calamari|rescue]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] scheduled for transport to the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] [[Warrior (Star Destroyer)|''Warrior'']]. ''Citadel 1'' boarded the container [[Xi 1 (Mon Calamari)|''Xi 1'']] containing the slaves and rescued them and, along with ''[[Citadel 2]]'', boarded the freighter ''[[Wiggins]]'' and escaped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], while the Rebel [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], [[Halley Kadorto]], fought of wave after wave of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE Bombers]] that were attempting to destroy the convoy containing the slaves.<ref name="XWOSG">''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]''</ref>
